title: ItemList
description: Multi-loader mod, that allows users to create item lists for builds within Minecraft. Removing the need to have a multi-display setup.
body:
# Welcome to ItemsList. 
### I am a single developer who wanted to do something outside the box. I have been working on trying to get this to work and thanks to the latest update with minecraft it has made is super easy to do. This is a light weight mod with a user friendly interface. Check below to see planned updates.


## New Multiplayer version released! This side is currently under testing but i belive its decent enough for the public to recieve!
For those using multiplayer, install on the server No files will be created and everything will be handled and saved in game!

_Forge version is nearing soon. Lot's of late nights and heading to my job with 0 sleep to get it working. Just trying to debug some compile errors and it's onto testing._

**New Update released**

# Known Bugs

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Issues when updating mod to new version not syncing up with modrinth []
- Issues with users not having the same version causing crashes []
- No error handling and can force crash someones game when not on the same version []

</details>
